_meta.purpose: Reference pilot search configuration for Version 2.5.0-rc1 (docs/37_Pilot_Operations_Guide.md).
_meta.how_to_use: This platform has no config-file loader in this release. A pilot operator reads these values and enters them manually into the web dashboard's New Search form (or the equivalent --flags on `python -m src.ui.cli search`). This file exists so every pilot session starts from the same documented, reviewed starting point, not to be executed directly.
_meta.estimate_disclaimer: Fields marked "estimate": true below are not backed by a literal, route-time travel-time provider. walking_distance and public_transport_time are the platform's own normalized proximity score (0.0-1.0, see docs/26_Geographic_Intelligence.md), not literal minutes. See docs/33_Release_Candidate_Acceptance.md 'Known Gaps' item 1.

destination.label: Universitat Politecnica de Valencia campus commute anchor
destination.address: Carrer Mestre Serrano, 3, 46120 Alboraia, Valencia, Spain

property_and_room._comment: property_type is left null on purpose: demo connector fixtures never populate Apartment.property_type in this release, so a pilot search that constrains on it will silently return zero demo-connector results (docs/33 Known Gaps item 3). Set it only when RentCast is the active connector.

budget._comment: min_price/max_price cover the actual demo connector fixture price range (950-2600) — see docs/38_Pilot_Feedback_pilot-valencia-01_2026-07-17.md, which found the previous example range (350-750) returned zero results. currency is left null (no preference) because demo connectors never populate Apartment.currency; setting a currency here would zero out every demo result the same way property_type does above.

proximity_preferences._comment: 0.0-1.0 normalized proximity score toward the destination above, not literal walking/transit minutes. Left null (no preference) because demo connector apartments have no coordinates at all, so any threshold value here excludes every demo result, not just an unrealistic one — see docs/38_Pilot_Feedback_pilot-valencia-01_2026-07-17.md finding #3. Set a real 0.0-1.0 value only when using a connector that populates coordinates (currently RentCast only).

amenities._comment: null means 'no preference' (filter omitted); true/false applies the filter.

ranking._comment: Built-in profiles are 'default' (price 40% / walking-distance 25% / availability 15% / public-transport 10% / lifestyle 10%) and 'comprehensive' (every ranking rule weighted equally). See docs/27_Intelligent_Ranking_Engine.md.

search._feedback_mode_comment: One of explicit_only | suggested | assisted (src/feedback/models.py FeedbackMode). 'suggested' computes inferred preferences but never applies them automatically, which is the recommended pilot default.

connectors._comment: Only the platform's own deterministic demo connectors are pre-approved for pilot use out of the box. RentCast ('rentcast') is a real, non-demo connector and may be added here only after a pilot operator has independently supplied their own RENTCAST_API_KEY in a local .env file — never in this config file.

monitoring._comment: Disabled by default for pilot sessions. Enable only after the operator has reviewed docs/30_Continuous_Monitoring.md and understands it creates a saved, versioned, re-runnable search.

notifications._comment: Disabled by default. Console and File channels are safe to enable locally with no external credentials (docs/37_Pilot_Operations_Guide.md section 15); Email/Webhook require real credentials this file must never contain.

result_limits._comment: Conservative cap for pilot sessions to keep result review manageable; the platform default with no cap set is unbounded.

report_settings._comment: Matches the existing report generator's default output location (docs/09_Report_System.md); not a new setting.
